mapper.sql: id, task_name, task_type, content, image_media_id, file_media_id, audio_media_id, video_media_id, msg_type, create_time, send_time, send_status, creator, total_count, sent_count, success_count, remark, template_id
mapper.insert: insert into mass_task ( task_name, task_type, content, image_media_id, file_media_id, audio_media_id, video_media_id, msg_type, create_time, send_time, send_status, creator, total_count, sent_count, success_count, remark, template_id ) values ( #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{imageMediaId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileMediaId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{audioMediaId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoMediaId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{msgType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sendStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sentCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{templateId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.select:
select
from mass_task order by create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
